name: E-2 options schema: resolved_options is emitted as compact JSON (no whitespace between keys) so downstream tools can parse a single line
command:
mkdir -p tree/g && printf 'rules:
  - id: g-ts-103
    options_schema:
      properties:
        a:
          default: 1
        b:
          default: 2
' > tree/g/rules.yaml && printf 'rules:
  g-ts-103: error
' > p.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/doctor.sh" --explain g-ts-103 --profile p.yaml --tree tree 2>err.txt; grep -qE 'resolved_options=\{"[a-z]+":[0-9]+,"[a-z]+":[0-9]+\}' err.txt && echo compact_json 1>&2
